nasb.text: And King Herod heard of it, for His name had become well known; and people were saying, “John the Baptist has risen from the dead, and that is why these miraculous powers are at work in Him.”

esv.text: King Herod heard of it, for Jesus’ name had become known. Some said, “John the Baptist has been raised from the dead. That is why these miraculous powers are at work in him.”

cnv.text: 當時耶穌的名聲傳揚出去，希律王也聽到了。有人說：“施洗的約翰從死人中復活了，所以他身上有行神蹟的能力。”

ccb.text: 耶稣声名远播，希律王也听说了祂的事。有人说：“施洗者约翰从死里复活了，所以能够行这些神迹。”

csbs.text: 耶稣的名声被传扬出去，希律王也听见了。有些人说：“施洗者约翰从死人中复活了，所以这些能力在他里面做工。”
